description: Evaluate the posterior maxilla for implant placement suitability by measuring the subantral bone height (distance from alveolar crest to maxillary sinus floor) at tooth positions #3 (Upper Right 2nd Molar) and #14 (Upper Left 2nd Molar) in the pre-loaded patient case. Create a clinical report at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\sinus_evaluation_report.txt containing the measured bone height in mm for each position and a clinical determination: 'Standard placement' (if height >= 10mm) or 'Sinus lift required' (if height < 10mm).
